§ 03 · writing

Essays, notes, and the Society in Silico book.

Policy analysis, agent-era tool-building, and the long history of computational models of society. Quantified where possible, honest about uncertainty, short on hedging.

§ 03.01

1 posts
  • Feb 24, 2026
    One year of Claude Code

    A year ago, Anthropic launched Claude Code. I've since consumed 10 billion tokens, mass-tweeted about it, and mass-customized it. Here's my setup and what I've learned.
